definition: MN 137's category of gladness grounded in seeing inconstancy, dissatisfaction, and change with discernment.
notes: Use this record for the renunciation-side gladness family in MN 137. Keep the renunciation tie explicit and keep the line connected to discernment of inconstancy, dissatisfaction, and change. Do not soften it into vague uplift language.

example_phrases.notes: Category label in the thirty-six positions section of MN 137.

authority_basis.scope: Supports the renunciation-side gladness family in the six-fields analysis.

translation_policy.default_scope: Use this as the standard English label for the nekkhammasita somanassa category in MN 137 unless a recorded local reason requires minor grammatical adjustment.
translation_policy.when_not_to_apply: Do not flatten the category into vague spiritual joy language or detach it from the renunciation-side distinction.
translation_policy.drift_risk: Prevents the MN 137 category from drifting into generic uplift language or losing the renunciation-side tie.
